heroHeadline: Bad Bunny: Grammy Album of the Year, Super Bowl Headliner, Most-Streamed Artist in History
heroSubtitle: Tracking the rise from SoundCloud uploads in Vega Baja to 100 billion Spotify streams, 4 global #1 years, and a historic Super Bowl halftime performance
footerNote: Data sourced from Rimas Entertainment, Billboard, Spotify Newsroom, RIAA, Latin Recording Academy, Recording Academy, and major media
